title: Spicy Chinese Kidney Bean Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew originating from China, made with kidney beans, mildly pungent flavors, and a touch of Peruvian spices.
instructions: 1. Heat sesame oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add sliced ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
4. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Stir in Peruvian Ají Amarillo paste and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add cooked kidney beans, bean stew sauce, salt, and black pepper.
7. Stir well to combine and bring to a simmer.
8. Reduce heat to low and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the stew thickens.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
10. Garnish with chopped green onions (if using) and serve hot.
11. Serve with steamed rice or noodles if desired.
